title: ends_with() function is missing in v1.1.4-dev
description:
The documentation (https://duckdb.org/docs/sql/functions/char.html) says ends_with() but it's no longer available.  

Is this a documentation bug or a DuckDB bug?

See also https://github.com/duckdb/duckdb/issues/8742

```
D select ends_with('abc','bc');
Catalog Error:
Scalar Function with name ends_with does not exist!
Did you mean "equi_width_bins"?

D select ('abc').suffix('bc');
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ suffix('abc', 'bc') ‚îÇ
‚îÇ       boolean       ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ true                ‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, str_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str_value) VALUES (1, 'abc'), (2, 'def'), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, str_value, position('abc', 'bc') > 0 AS ends_with_bc FROM test_strings WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE str_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, str_value FROM test_strings WHERE str_value LIKE '%c';
key_bug_features: ends_with() function is missing in the database
